general.title: Histogram [SPAC] [DMAP]
general.instructions: Plot the histogram of cells based on a specific feature or annotation. \ Please refer to DUET Documentation, and GitHub Documentation for further information.

parameters.name: Plot By
parameters.description: Plot the histogram on the feature or annotation

parameters.name: Annotation
parameters.description: Annotation name in the analysis to plot histogram. Can't be used with Feature.

parameters.name: Table
parameters.description: Source table to perform the visualization. Default is Original, referring to the raw dataset.

parameters.name: Feature
parameters.description: Feature name in the analysis to plot histogram. Can't be used with Annotation.

parameters.name: Group by
parameters.description: Choose either to group the histogram by another annotation. Default is None to disable this option.

parameters.name: Together
parameters.description: If Together is True, and Group by is not None, create one plot for all groups. Otherwise, divide every histogram by the number of elements.

parameters.name: Multiple
parameters.description: Approach for showing multiple labels when "Group By" and "Together" are on. Existing methods are: layer, dodge, stack, and fill.

parameters.name: Take Y log
parameters.description: Set Y axis scale to log 10.  Default "False" will present linear axis scale.

parameters.name: Take X Log
parameters.description: Set X axis scale to log 10.  Default "False" will present linear axis scale. Only applies to feature.

parameters.name: Bins
parameters.description: The number of bins in the histogram. Default "auto" will set it automatically. Only applies to feature.

parameters.name: Shrink Number
parameters.description: Scale the width of each bar or a group of bars relative to the bin width.

parameters.name: Figure Width
parameters.description: Width of the figure.

parameters.name: Figure Height
parameters.description: Height of the figure.

parameters.name: Font Size
parameters.description: Font size of the figure.

parameters.name: Figure DPI
parameters.description: Higher the DPI, clearer the image.

parameters.name: Legend in Figure
parameters.description: Display legend inside the plotting area.

parameters.name: Legend Location
parameters.description: Location of legend.

parameters.name: Bin Transparency
parameters.description: Transparency of bins

parameters.name: Stat
parameters.description: Determines the statistical transformation for histogram bins. Default is "count". Options: "count" displays the count of cells in each bin; "frequency" shows the number of cells per bin, normalized by bin width;  "density" normalizes the histogram so that the total area equals 1; "probability" normalize such that bar heights sum to 1, bar height reflects the probability of observing each bin; "percent" normalize such that bar heights sum to 100, each bin's height shows the percentage of total cells it contains.

parameters.name: X Axis Label Rotation
parameters.description: The degree of rotation of X labels. Default is 0 (horizontal, text starting from left to right)
